Writing Projects About
Writing Projects About

Your Name

Designer, developer, and maker of things.

GitHub Twitter Email

Hi! I'm a full-stack developer with a passion for building clean, performant web applications. I care deeply about developer experience and the details that make software feel polished.

I've been writing code professionally for over five years, working across startups and larger teams. My current interests include distributed systems, programming language design, and the intersection of design and engineering.

What I work with

  • Languages: JavaScript / TypeScript, Ruby, Python, Go
  • Frontend: React, Next.js, plain HTML & CSS
  • Backend: Node.js, Rails, PostgreSQL, Redis
  • Tools: Git, Docker, Terraform, Vercel

Outside of work

When I'm not at my desk I'm usually hiking, reading science fiction, or tinkering with electronics. I occasionally write about things that interest me — you can find that on the writing page.
